names.name: Jingan Village Small Kang General North East Ward

types.type: general, small general, Kang general, Bai general, Hei general

names.name: Jingan Village Shigandang Behing Wufu Dian

jí xīng bǐng yào shén ēn hào dàng qiān lǐ jìng bō lán

trans.div: The pole star shines brightly, the grace of God spreads thousands of miles, and the waves are peaceful.
